questions.text: Due to inert pair effect _ oxidation state is more stable than _ for Pb.
questions.subject: Chemistry

options.explanation: Due to the inert pair effect, the +2 oxidation state is more stable than the +4 oxidation state for lead (Pb). This effect becomes more significant in heavier elements of the p-block, where the s-electrons are less available for bonding.
The 4+ state is less stable than 2+ state of Pb. Hence, it is incorrect.

questions.explanation: Compounds of Pb+4 act as strong oxidizing agents while those of Pb+2 act as reducing agents.Pb+2 > Pb +4

questions.text: IUPAC name of Glutaric acid is
questions.subject: Chemistry

options.explanation: It's common name is Succinic acid.
It's common name is Glutaric acid.
It's common name is Malonic acid.
It's common name is Adipic acid.

questions.explanation: The IUPAC have fix rules which help us to name compounds universally. By using that fix rules we named the Glutaric acid as Pentane dioic acid.
